Soil Restoration

Feed the Soil. Learn the science of microbial life and composting techniques.

Zero-Waste Systems

Waste Nothing. Implementing circular agriculture models on small-scale farms.

0% Complete 4 Lessons

Locked

Water Management

Climate-Smart. Efficient irrigation and rainwater harvesting strategies.

Prerequisite required 5 Lessons
lightbulb Spotlight

Water-Smart Agriculture (WaSA)

Implement micro-catchments around perennial crops to capture runoff. This simple technique can increase soil moisture retention by up to 30% during dry spells.

Explore WaSA Techniques arrow_forward

Share Your Progress

Community learning thrives on real-world application. What worked on your farm this week?

About Us

Rooted in Tradition, Growing for the Future. The Bill of Senga is a sustainable living hub where indigenous knowledge meets modern agricultural science to build thriving ecosystems.
